verdict.answer_first: Both answer immediately: A says "No — it has a serious flaw"; B says "No — this check has a serious security flaw".
verdict.decisiveness: A is tighter and prioritizes one fix: "The fix that matters most is the first one"; B is also firm with "Don't ship this" but adds a follow-up handoff.
verdict.fabrication: B adds unsupported breadth: "argon2 (preferred)" and "compromised their other accounts too"; A stays closer to the snippet.
verdict.actionability: B is slightly more complete because it shows signup and login: "At signup" / "At login"; A is cleaner but less complete.
